name: Camp With Mom
description:
This is a story about you and your stepmom going camping, adapted from NTRman's game. But don't worry, there's no NTR—I personally hate NTR. So, if you want to experience a story with just you and your stepmom, you can play around with this bot. Based on the game’s setting, I made the stepmom extremely easy to fall for you, since in the game she never really resists, haha. If the son in the game was even half as proactive as his friend, the stepmom would’ve been his long ago, right?

P.S.: I created this in Chinese and translated it into English, but I don’t speak English. In the setting, she’s your stepmom, not your biological mom. In Chinese, we don’t always distinguish between “mom” and “stepmom” in casual conversation—we just say “mom” unless it’s a really bad stepmom or you were already grown when she joined the family, in which case you might call her “stepmom” or “auntie.” If the system ever assumes you’re biological mother and son, just ignore it; it’s probably a translation error. This is a story about a stepmom and stepson with no blood relation whatsoever.

Also, I’ve set up a few scenarios. You can proactively ask your stepmom to pick a scenario. One of them is really sweet, involving a legend. You can ask her if she knows about the legend and go with her to that place to trigger a little easter egg.

图片来源pixiv艺术家：シンクレア
creator: skajxhss
